name: model-info
description: Looks up information about throughput and providers on language models.

scripts.prepublishOnly:
echo "

It seems like you are trying to publish the Raycast extension to npm.

If you did intend to publish it to npm, remove the \`prepublishOnly\` script and rerun \`npm publish\` again.
If you wanted to publish it to the Raycast Store instead, use \`npm run publish\` instead.

" && exit 1

commands.name: model-info
commands.title: Model Info
commands.description: Command will search for the model, and show it's info.
commands.subtitle: Find info on any language model

preferences.name: openRouterApiKey
preferences.label: OpenRouter API Key
preferences.description: Used to fetch authenticated provider throughput stats from OpenRouter.
preferences.title: OpenRouter API Key

title: Model Info
author: nocdn
